config.script:
#define ON_ERROR_RESUME_NEXT on error resume next #define ERR_CLEAR err.clear
#define CONNTYPE_NONE 0 #define CONNTYPE_MSSQL 1 #define CONNTYPE_DSN 2 #define CONNTYPE_EXCEL 3
class CForeignConnection private m_pADOConnection private m_pPerforming private m_eConnType
private sub class_initialize() set m_pADOConnection = nothing set m_pPerforming = nothing m_eConnType = CONNTYPE_NONE end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'TODO set m_pADOConnection = nothing set m_pPerforming = nothing end sub
public sub hide_progress() set m_pPerforming = nothing end sub
public sub show_progress(strText) if m_pPerforming is nothing then set m_pPerforming = doc_.performing(strText) else m_pPerforming.text = strText end if end sub
public function connectMSSQL(byval strServer,byval strDBName,byval strUser,byval strPassword) connectMSSQL = false ON_ERROR_RESUME_NEXT
set m_pADOConnection = doc_.system.activex("ADODB.Connection") if m_pADOConnection is nothing then exit function end if
show_progress "Trwa łączenie z serwerem " + strServer
m_pADOConnection.ConnectionTimeout = 60 m_pADOConnection.CommandTimeout = 180
'proba podlaczenia do serwera m_pADOConnection.open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Server=" + strServer + ";DATABASE=" + strDBName, strUser, strPassword
ERR_CLEAR
'true jezeli podlaczono hide_progress connectMSSQL = (m_pADOConnection.state = clng(1)) m_eConnType = CONNTYPE_MSSQL end function
public function connectDSN(byval strDSN,byval strUser,byval strPassword) connectDSN = false
ON_ERROR_RESUME_NEXT
set m_pADOConnection = doc_.system.activex("ADODB.Connection") if m_pADOConnection is nothing then exit function end if
show_progress "Trwa łączenie ze źródłem danych " + strDSN
m_pADOConnection.ConnectionTimeout = 60 m_pADOConnection.CommandTimeout = 180
if strUser <> "" then m_pADOConnection.open strDSN, strUser, strPassword else m_pADOConnection.open strDSN end if
ERR_CLEAR
'true jezeli podlaczono hide_progress connectDSN = (m_pADOConnection.state = clng(1)) m_eConnType = CONNTYPE_DSN end function
public function connectExcel(byval strFileName) connectExcel = false ON_ERROR_RESUME_NEXT
set m_pADOConnection = doc_.system.activex("ADODB.Connection") if m_pADOConnection is nothing then exit function end if
#ifdef APPCONFIG_USE_EXCEL_8 m_pADOConnection.Provider = "Microsoft.Jet.OLEDB.4.0" m_pADOConnection.Properties("Extended Properties") = "Excel 8.0; IMEX=1" #else m_pADOConnection.Provider = "Microsoft.ACE.OLEDB.12.0" m_pADOConnection.Properties("Extended Properties") = "Excel 12.0;HDR=YES;IMEX=1" #endif
m_pADOConnection.Open strFileName
ERR_CLEAR
'true jezeli podlaczono connectExcel = (m_pADOConnection.state = clng(1)) m_eConnType = CONNTYPE_EXCEL end function
public property get connection() set connection = m_pADOConnection end property
public property get connection_type() connection_type = m_eConnType end property end class
class CRemoteNAVO2002Client private m_pRemoteApp private m_pRemoteDoc private m_pRemoteTopPage
private sub class_initialize() set m_pRemoteApp = nothing set m_pRemoteDoc = nothing set m_pRemoteTopPage = nothing end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'TODO set m_pRemoteTopPage = nothing set m_pRemoteDoc = nothing set m_pRemoteApp = nothing end sub
public function connect(byval strRemoteClient) connect = connect_ex(strRemoteClient,"#*varApplication",trans_.var(GVAR_DBNAME),false) end function
public function connect_ex(byval strRemoteClient,byval strApplication,byval strDB,byval bSilent) connect_ex = false dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa łączenie z " + strRemoteClient) on error resume next err.clear set m_pRemoteApp = createobject("navo2002.client",strRemoteClient) if err.number <> 0 then exit function end if on error goto 0 set m_pRemoteDoc = m_pRemoteApp.document dim strCmd : strCmd = "varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varNewThread=1 varDestPage=72007 " if bSilent then strCmd = strCmd + "varUIStyle=0 " else strCmd = strCmd + "varUIStyle=1 " end if strCmd = strCmd + " varApplication='" + strApplication + "' varDbName='" + strDB + "' " +_ "varDBServer='" + trans_.var(GVAR_DBSERVER) + "'" m_pRemoteDoc.callcommand(strCmd) set m_pRemoteTopPage = m_pRemoteDoc.gettoppage connect_ex = true end function
public property get document set document = m_pRemoteDoc end property
public property get page set page = m_pRemoteTopPage end property end class
function new_remote_client(byval strRemoteClient) set new_remote_client = new_remote_client_ex(strRemoteClient,"#*varApplication",trans_.var(GVAR_DBNAME),false) end function
function new_remote_client_ex(byval strRemoteClient,byval strApplication,byval strDB,byval bSilent) set new_remote_client_ex = nothing dim pRC : set pRC = new CRemoteNAVO2002Client
if not pRC.connect_ex(strRemoteClient,strApplication,strDB,bSilent) then exit function end if
set new_remote_client_ex = pRC end function
#comment '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' architecture oriented functions (low level) #comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------------
function connectMSSQL(byval strServer,byval strDBName,byval strUser,byval strPassword) set connectMSSQL = nothing dim pForCon : set pForCon = new CForeignConnection
if pForCon.connectMSSQL(strServer,strDBName,strUser,strPassword) then set connectMSSQL = pForCon end if end function
function connectDSN(byval strDSN,byval strUser,byval strPassword) set connectDSN = nothing dim pForCon : set pForCon = new CForeignConnection
if pForCon.connectDSN(strDSN,strUser,strPassword) then set connectDSN = pForCon end if end function
function connectExcel(byval strFileName) set connectExcel = nothing dim pForCon : set pForCon = new CForeignConnection
if pForCon.connectExcel(strFileName) then set connectExcel = pForCon end if end function
#comment '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' application oriented functions (high level) #comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------------
#define STD_DATABASE_NAME_FIRMA "navo_firma" #define STD_DATABASE_NAME_KADRY "navo99_1"
function connectFirmaSQL(byval strServer) set connectFirmaSQL = connectMSSQL(strServer,STD_DATABASE_NAME_FIRMA,"DBA","y1410grun") if not connectFirmaSQL is nothing then exit function end if set connectFirmaSQL = connectMSSQL(strServer,STD_DATABASE_NAME_FIRMA,"sa","") end function
function connectFirma38Sybase() set connectFirma38Sybase = connectDSN("NAVO_FIRMA", "dba", "y1410grun") end function
function connectKadry(byval strServer) set connectKadry = connectMSSQL(strServer,STD_DATABASE_NAME_KADRY,"navo98","czapajew") if not connectKadry is nothing then exit function end if set connectKadry = connectMSSQL(strServer,STD_DATABASE_NAME_KADRY,"sa","") end function
